sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_id Int32, event_time DateTime);
INSERT INTO test_dates (event_id, event_time) VALUES (1, makeDateTime(2023, 2, 28, 17, 12, 33));
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = makeDateTime(2023, 3, 1, 18, 0, 0) WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT event_id, event_time FROM test_dates WHERE event_time > makeDateTime(2023, 2, 28, 0, 0, 0);
SELECT event_id, makeDateTime(2023, 2, 28, 17, 12, 33) AS specific_time FROM test_dates;
